About

AI-powered e-commerce specialist based in The Hague, Netherlands. I use AI tools strategically to create content that converts from product descriptions and email campaigns to social media, SEO copy, and full marketing campaigns. Bilingual in Dutch and English, I work with brands across Europe to deliver content that drives results.

Client Work
Carlo Lanza
Italian Socks Brand Content Audit, Copywriting & Instagram Captions

Content audit and full rewrite for a real Dutch e-commerce brand selling Italian luxury socks in 400+ stores worldwide. Identified AI signals, inconsistent tone, and missing SEO. Delivered rewritten copy, product descriptions, and Instagram captions.

Brand: Carlo Lanza
Market: Netherlands + 400 stores worldwide
Deliverables: Brand copy, descriptions, captions
Language: Dutch (copy) + English (social)
Product Description 1 Mystery Pakket (Before & After)
Before
Dit Mystery pakket bestaat uit 5 paar heren sokken t.w.v. 17,99 per paar die langzaam aan uit de collectie verdwijnen van Carlo Lanza. Deze sokken worden niet meer wordt geproduceerd. Dit pakket kost normaal 89,95 en is nu met 50% korting verkrijgbaar voor slechts 45,-. Leuke verrassing; je weet niet precies welke sokken je krijgt, maar wel dat de kwaliteit altijd op een goed niveau is.
After
Vijf zorgvuldig geselecteerde paren luxe herensokken uit eerdere collecties, gemaakt met de kwaliteit en afwerking die je van Carlo Lanza mag verwachten. Elk paar draagt die vertrouwde mix van Italiaans vakmanschap en tijdloze stijl, terwijl het verrassingselement dit pakket extra leuk maakt. Was ze op lage temperatuur om de kwaliteit zo lang mogelijk te behouden.
Product Description 2 Intrecci Donkerblauw (Before & After)
Before
Donkerblauw in combinatie met merino wol en Italiaans vakmanschap? Dan kom je uit bij deze Intrecci herensokken. Merino wollen herensokken kopen doe je met vertrouwen bij Carlo Lanza. Luxe, duurzaamheid en elegantie komen samen ideaal als cadeau voor elke gelegenheid.
After
Donkerblauw, subtiel geweven en uitgevoerd in zachte merino wol. Deze merino wollen herensokken stralen rust, klasse en comfort uit. De fijne structuur ademt mooi mee en voelt de hele dag aangenaam aan, terwijl het Italiaanse vakmanschap zichtbaar is in elk detail.
Instagram Caption Made in Italy
Instagram @carlolanza_official
From nothing to selling socks in 400+ stores worldwide. Carlo Lanza socks carry a story of skill, care and tradition. Every pair is carefully crafted with safe dyes and ethical standards in mind. Feel the difference that authenticity makes.
#MadeInItaly #LuxurySocks #Menswear
Instagram Caption — Father's Day Gift
Instagram — @carlolanza_official
Give Dad something that actually fits his style and not just his age. The Carlo Lanza multicolor gift box includes three pairs of socks made with attention to detail and Italian craftsmanship. Packaged in a classy box with gold accents these socks are a subtle statement of elegance. Celebrate the man who appreciates quality with a gift that speaks for itself. Share in the comments which color he would love most.
#fathersday #luxurysocks #present
Instagram Caption — Giuseppe Grey Scarf
Instagram — @carlolanza_official
Wrap yourself in Italian elegance with the Giuseppe grey scarf. Crafted from premium merino wool with a touch of cashmere this scarf brings warmth and refined softness to every outfit. Each piece is made in Italy by skilled artisans who honor decades of tradition and craftsmanship. Subtle yet luxurious it elevates both formal and casual looks effortlessly. Style is in the details and this scarf speaks for itself.
#italianscarfs #italiancraftsmanship #mensstyle

Campaign Showcase
NOIR Fictional Brand
Luxury Streetwear Full E-Commerce Campaign

Complete e-commerce campaign for a luxury streetwear brand. Five content types, one consistent brand voice. All content created using strategic AI prompting.

Brand: NOIR luxury streetwear
Audience: Young creatives, 18-30
USP: Limited drops, handmade, Amsterdam
Tone: Dark, minimal, confident, exclusive
Product Description Shadow Oversized Hoodie
NOIR's Shadow oversized hoodie sits at the intersection of function and identity. Built from 100% organic cotton with a dense, premium hand feel. The fit is oversized, but precise engineered for presence, not excess. Designed in Amsterdam, every hoodie includes handmade details that reflect a slower, more intentional process. Released in limited drops. Black and charcoal only.
Instagram Post
The Shadow Hoodie. Quiet detail, heavy presence. Organic cotton, designed for those who move differently. 🖤
#luxurystreetwear #AmsterdamFashion #oversizedhoodies
Welcome Email Post-Purchase
Subject line:You made your move.
Preview text:Your NOIR order is confirmed. Here's what comes next.
Opening:Welcome to NOIR. You chose something intentional.
Body:Your order is on its way. Every piece is checked, packed, and shipped with the same precision it was made with. No rush. No noise.
CTA:Use code NOIR10 for 10% off your next order. No expiry.
Upsell Copy Checkout
The Shadow Hoodie was made to pair with the NOIR Cargo Pants same quiet weight, same dark intention. Add them now with 15% off.

How I Work
1
Understand your brand
I start with a deep dive into your brand, audience, tone, and goals. No generic templates. Every piece of content is built specifically for you.
2
Audit what exists
For existing brands, I review your current content and identify what is working, what is not, and where AI signals or inconsistencies are hurting your brand image.
3
Create with AI precision
I use advanced AI tools with strategic prompting to generate content tailored to your brand voice. Every prompt is crafted to produce usable, client-ready output.
4
Quality control
I compare outputs, check SEO integration, verify tone consistency, and remove AI signals before anything reaches you.
5
Deliver fast
You receive polished content in 1-2 days. Product descriptions, emails, social posts, campaign visuals all with consistent brand voice.
What Sets Me Apart
SpeedAI-powered workflow I deliver in days, not weeks
ConsistencySame brand voice across every content type
BilingualNative Dutch + fluent English for the full European market
Full-stackCopy, SEO, email, social, visuals, and automations one specialist
